How We Work

From Diagnosis
to Deployment.

Most companies try to implement AI without first understanding what's broken. We start with a diagnostic, then build the strategy, then deploy the system. Every engagement follows the same progression — you choose where you enter.

Contact Us
1
Audit & Consultation
2
Strategy & Transformation
3
Build & Implementation
Tier 1

Audit &
Consultation

Clarify what is broken, what is possible, and what should happen next. Best for companies that need clarity before committing to a direction.

Contact Us
🔍
AI Audit
Zonar™-powered revenue diagnostic. Identifies exactly where your AI, sales, marketing and operations have disconnects — and what they are costing you. Delivered in 24 hours.
Contact Us
💬
Consultation
Strategic advisory session to shape your AI direction. Current-state review, opportunity mapping, prioritisation, and next-step recommendation. The bridge between the audit and full strategy.
Book Consultation →
Tier 2

Strategy &
Transformation

Design the operating model. Define how AI integrates with your business — not as a tool, but as a core part of how you run. Best for companies that know they need to change but need the blueprint.

Discuss Tier 2 →
🧠
AI Strategy
Define your AI operating model — where AI plays a role, how it connects your teams, what it automates, and how it scales. A clear strategic roadmap built around your business, not a generic framework.
⚙️
Digital Transformation
Redesign how your business executes. Workflow redesign, cross-department alignment, process optimisation, and a transformation roadmap that your team can actually implement — not a 200-page report that sits on a shelf.
Tier 3

Build &
Implementation

Deploy. Build the agentic AI systems, connect your workflows, and roll out Zonar OS™ across the business. Best for companies that have clarity and are ready to execute.

Explore Tier 3 →
🤖
Agentic AI Build
Design and build autonomous AI agents that act across your business — qualifying leads, routing workflows, triggering actions, connecting departments. Built for your specific processes, not out-of-the-box.
Learn more →
⚡
Zonar OS™ Implementation
Deploy Zonar OS™ — our agentic AI operating system — into your business. Full system setup, workflow connection, team onboarding, and execution rollout. The engine that runs everything.
Learn more →

You Don't Have to Start at Tier 3

Most clients start with a free audit. That tells us exactly where the gaps are. Some engage at Tier 1 for clarity. Others move straight to Tier 2 to redesign their operating model. A few arrive ready to build. The path is yours — the progression is always the same.

Contact Us Talk to a Senior Team Member
Neural Horizons AI

Specialist AI & digital transformation consultancy. We close revenue leaks and break down silos. Serving clients globally.
